H0200A_TRIL_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200A Urinary Toileting Program: Trial Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has had a trial toileting program (e.g., scheduled toileting, prompted voiding, or bladder training). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to Determine
260 H0200B_RSPNS_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200B_RSPNS_TOILTG_PGM_CD H0200B Urinary Toileting Program: Response To Toileting Program Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the response
